news.headline: Walmart offers cookout essentials for eight under $50 for July Fourth celebrations, focusing on low prices.
news.summary: BENTONVILLE, Ark.-- Walmart is celebrating summer by offering its Every Day Low Prices on summer essentials for customers to enjoy warm weather, barbecues, and outdoor gatherings with loved ones. The retail giant ensures that customers can save during the season's big celebrations like Fourth of July and for everyday moments in between. In line with this, The National Retail Federation has recognized Walmart for its commitment to providing affordable prices. This initiative allows customers to make the most of their summertime without breaking the bank.

news.headline: Germany could oppose ECB plan to lower French bond yields, sources say. Important numbers: France, Germany, ECB.
Debate highlights for businesses: Tax policy, inflation, economy, and markets to take center stage with Biden and Trump.
news.summary: An event taking place tonight will see President Biden and Donald Trump discussing key topics such as tax policy, inflation, the economy, and markets. These issues hold significant importance for corporate America and Wall Street. This discussion is anticipated to offer insights and strategies on handling these crucial matters. It is expected that a wide audience, including professionals and experts, will be keenly observing and analyzing this event in light of the impact it may have on various sectors.

news.headline: LocatorX wins "Asset Tracking Software of the Year" from SupplyTech Breakthrough, recognized for standout technology services.
news.summary: A technology company based in Orlando, Florida, LocatorX, has recently been awarded "Asset Tracking Software of the Year" by SupplyTech Breakthrough. This recognition comes from the annual SupplyTech Breakthrough Awards program, an initiative by SupplyTech Breakthrough, which is a prominent market intelligence organization. The award acknowledges LocatorX's Supply Chain Intelligence Platform for its exceptional performance in the supply chain technology and logistics sector on a global scale. This platform utilizes advanced data analytics technologies to improve asset tracking efficiency.

news.headline: Trader anticipates seizing liquidity as Bitcoin price hits $62K, aiming for rebound to $70,000 amid high ask orders.
news.summary: Investors who are bullish on Bitcoin are hoping for a stronger price rebound, as there is a significant amount of selling interest between the current spot price and $70,000. This suggests that there may be resistance at this key price level, indicating potential challenges for Bitcoin to break past $70,000 in the near future.

news.headline: Halcyon will donate all proceeds from flagship product to support service members and veterans for Fourth of July.
news.summary: In Red Bank, New Jersey, on June 27, 2024, Halcyon, a leading technology company focusing on advanced data integration, has introduced a new initiative in anticipation of the Fourth of July. The initiative aims to pay tribute to the courageous individuals and commemorate the birth of the nation and the cherished freedoms that come with it.

news.headline: IoT in Healthcare Market set to exceed $926.9B by 2031, 16.8% CAGR; $215.4B in 2022 to $252.1B in 2023.
news.summary: In June 27, 2024, in Westford, Massachusetts, it was reported by SkyQuest that the worldwide IoT in Healthcare Market had a value of USD 215.4 billion in 2022. It is projected to increase from USD 252.1 billion in 2023 to USD 926.9 billion by 2031, showcasing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.8% during the forecast period.

news.headline: Life Line Screening partners with Georgia Retired Educators Assoc. to offer cardiovascular screenings to 33,000 members to prevent risks.
news.summary: Life Line Screening and the Georgia Retired Educators Association (GREA) have joined forces to protect the health of more than 33,000 GREA members. This partnership will offer GREA members crucial preventive health screenings by Life Line Screening, with a focus on detecting cardiovascular disease and stroke risks at an early stage. In the United States, cardiovascular disease causes over 700,000 deaths each year. This collaboration aims to ensure GREA members have access to vital health screenings that can potentially save lives.

news.headline: HiLabs study uncovers provider directory inconsistencies, highlighted in MedPAC June 2024 report to Congress.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Bethesda, Maryland, HiLabs, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven healthcare data management solutions, revealed that a study conducted by their Chief Medical Officer, Dr. Neel Butala, utilizing HiLabs technology, was prominently highlighted in the Medicare.

news.headline: Apogee Enterprises, Inc. reported 1Q FY25 sales of $331.5M (vs expectations of $333.2M), with revenue down 8.3% Y/Y. Gross margin improved 410 basis points to 29.8%. Adjusted operating income rose 25.9% to $42.5M, with operating margin up 350 basis points Y/Y to 12.8%. Adjusted EBITDA increased 20.2% Y/Y to $52.6M.
news.summary: In the first quarter of fiscal year 25, Apogee Enterprises, Inc. (NASDAQ:APOG) disclosed sales amounting to $331.5 million, which fell short of the anticipated $333.2 million. The revenue experienced an 8.3% decrease year-over-year, attributed to diminished volume. However, there was a significant enhancement in gross margin by 410 basis points year-over-year, reaching 29.8%. This improvement was primarily due to a more favorable project mix in Architectural Services, reduced material expenses, lower insurance costs, and increased productivity efficiency. Adjusted operating income witnessed a notable 25.9% surge to $42.5 million, with the operating margin also ameliorating by 350 basis points year-over-year to 12.8%. This rise was driven by a favorable project mix, reduced material and insurance expenditures, productivity improvements, and a decline in bad debt expenses. Furthermore, adjusted EBITDA for the quarter escalated by 20.2% year-over-year to $52.6 million.

news.headline: Disney Cruise Line unveils new dining experiences on Disney Treasure ship: "The Aristocats" venue, "Guardians of the Galaxy" dinner, "Coco" menu.
news.summary: Disney Cruise Line recently announced the introduction of a new venue inspired by "The Aristocats," marking the first time the film has been featured on board. Additionally, a new dining experience based on "Guardians of the Galaxy" will be offered, along with menu items inspired by "Coco." The announcement was made from Celebration, Fla., on June 27, 2024. This development adds to the array of dining options on the cruise line, enhancing the experience for guests.

news.headline: Michigan-based logistics REIT Lineage Inc. files for IPO seeking $3B, aiming for a $30B valuation with 482 warehouses.
news.summary: Lineage Inc., a company specializing in temperature-controlled storage and logistics, has recently filed for an initial public offering (IPO), becoming the latest real estate investment trust (REIT) to enter the public equities market. The filing was reported by Crain’s Detroit Business. Based in Novi, Michigan, Lineage is aiming to raise $3 billion in the IPO, with a valuation exceeding $30 billion. Financial analysis by Renaissance Capital suggests that the company might actually generate around $3.5 billion from the IPO. Lineage currently operates 482 warehouses. For more details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Pamos Cannabis Cocktails expands in Southeast US market via alcohol distributor, advocating for cannabis beverage regulation.
news.summary: A prominent cannabis beverage brand, Pamos, along with its board member from the Cannabis Beverage Association, remains a strong advocate for regulation to promote the growth of the alternative beverage category. Based in Los Angeles, as of June 27, 2024, Pamos is at the forefront with its Cannabis Cocktails.

news.headline: Simply Good Foods beats EPS expectations in Q3 with 50 cents vs. 48 cents. Revenue slightly misses at $334.76M. NA sales up 3.2%, Int'l down 2.4%. EBITDA at $71.9M. Gross profit up to $133.6M.
news.summary: Simply Good Foods Company (NASDAQ: SMPL) surpassed analyst expectations for fiscal third-quarter 2024, reporting adjusted earnings per share of 50 cents compared to the consensus of 48 cents. Despite falling short of the street view at $334.76 million, the company achieved third-quarter revenues. North America saw a 3.2% increase in net sales, while International experienced a 2.4% decline from the previous year. Quarterly adjusted EBITDA also saw growth, standing at $71.9 million compared to $66.6 million in the year-ago period. Gross profit for the quarter reached $133.6 million, marking a $14.4 million increase.

news.headline: Eni sells Alaskan assets to Hilcorp, transaction value TBD. Strategy to streamline, rebalance portfolio. Aiming for $8.5 billion net inflow by 2027.
news.summary: Eni S.p.A. (NYSE:E) stocks have surged following the finalization of a deal with Hilcorp to sell complete ownership of the Nikaitchuq and Oooguruk assets in Alaska. The exact value of this transaction is yet to be disclosed. This move is in line with Eni's strategy to streamline its upstream operations, rebalance its portfolio, and offload non-strategic assets. Eni aims to achieve a net portfolio inflow of approximately $8.5 billion (8 billion euros) within the 2024-27 Plan period through its growth-oriented strategy, supported by a strong financial framework. The company intends to accomplish this by enhancing its Upstream portfolio and decreasing high equity ownership in exploration activities.

news.headline: FDA rejects accelerated approval for Merck-Daiichi Sankyo lung cancer drug due to manufacturing facility inspection issues.
news.summary: The FDA recently issued a Complete Response Letter (CRL) for the Biologics License Application (BLA) seeking accelerated approval of Daiichi Sankyo (DSKYF) and Merck & Co Inc’s patritumab deruxtecan (HER3-DXd) for adult patients with locally advanced or metastatic EGFR-mutated non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) after two or more prior treatments. The CRL was linked to findings from an inspection of a third-party manufacturing facility. Notably, the letter did not raise concerns regarding the drug's efficacy or safety. For more details, refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: i-80 Gold reports positive metallurgical results from Ruby Hill and Golden Hill projects.
news.summary: In Reno, Nevada, on June 27, 2024, i-80 Gold Corp. (TSX:IAU) (NYSE:IAUX) shared the outcomes of Metallurgical testing conducted by Blue Coast Research Ltd. on specimens from the Ruby Hill and Golden Hill (FAD) Projects of the company.

news.headline: Red River elevates Sara Siddiqui to Vice President of Strategic Partnerships in Claremont, N.H. and Chantilly, Va.
news.summary: A woman named Sara Siddiqui has been promoted to Vice President of Strategic Partnerships by Red River at locations in Claremont, NH, and Chantilly, VA, as announced through a Business Wire press release.

news.headline: First Federal Bank of Kansas City appoints Jenny Michaels as Chief Risk Officer succeeding Mike Sidebottom, ensuring safe lending practices.
news.summary: First Federal Bank of Kansas City has appointed Jenny Michaels as its new Chief Risk Officer, replacing Mike Sidebottom in a move that demonstrates their dedication to fair and secure lending practices. Michaels will be responsible for overseeing the bank's risk framework. The announcement was made in Leawood, Kansas, on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: Puffer Finance raises $18M, shifts to rollups for Ethereum liquidity gap bridging.
news.summary: The protocol is presently concentrating on connecting the liquidity gaps among various solutions on the Ethereum network.

news.headline: Coinbase backs WNBA cup, treats fans at female sports venues. #WNBA #WomenSponsorship
US Q1 GDP growth revised up to 1.4%, consumer spending weakens, jobless claims hit nearly 3-year high at 1,839,000.
news.summary: The U.S. economy experienced a 1.4% increase in real GDP in the first quarter of 2024, slightly up from the 1.3% second estimate but a slowdown from the 3.4% growth in Q4 2023. The decrease was due to reduced consumer spending, exports, and government spending. Inflation increased by 3.1%. Weekly jobless claims decreased by 6,000 to 233,000, below expectations, while continuing claims rose by 18,000 to 1,839,000, the highest since November.

news.headline: Nikon introduces AX R with NSPARC 2K software, offering maximum resolution and 4x field of view for biotechnology research.
news.summary: In Melville, New York, on June 27, 2024, Nikon Instruments Inc. unveiled the latest addition to its AX series, the AX R featuring the NSPARC 2K software. This innovative solution delivers exceptional resolution performance over an expanded field of view, covering four times the previous area. This advancement showcases Nikon's commitment to pushing the boundaries of imaging technology and providing cutting-edge solutions to its customers.

news.headline: Blue Lion Capital pushes HomeStreet to remove change in control payments; FirstSun advised hedging against interest rate risk, but HomeStreet's profitability declined. FirstSun lowered merger terms on April 30th.
news.summary: Following the merger announcement in January 2024, HomeStreet was advised by FirstSun Capital Bancorp to hedge against interest rate risk, but CEO Mark Mason declined the suggestion. As a result, HomeStreet saw a decline in profitability and value due to increasing interest rates. On April 30th, FirstSun modified and decreased the terms of the merger agreement, impacting the deal moving forward.

news.headline: SC rejects SEC's admin tribunals for enforcement actions without juries, a violation of the Constitution.
news.summary: A common practice in executive agencies involves tribunals that hear enforcement actions without juries, which some critics argue violates the Constitution.

news.headline: Pfizer and BioNTech receive EU approval for Omicron JN.1-adapted COVID-19 vaccine targeting SARS-CoV-2 variant. Recommended for individuals 6 months and older. Evidence shows targeting JN.1 helps maintain vaccine effectiveness.
news.summary: Pfizer Inc. and BioNTech SE have announced that the European Medicines Agency's Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use has recommended marketing authorization for their Omicron JN.1-adapted monovalent COVID-19 vaccine, known as COMIRNATY® JN.1. This vaccine is designed for individuals aged 6 months and older to prevent COVID-19 caused by the SARS-CoV-2 virus. The adaptation was based on recommendations from the World Health Organization and the EMA's Emergency Task Force to target the SARS-CoV-2 variant JN.1 for the 2024-2025 vaccination campaign. The ETF highlighted that focusing on JN.1 is crucial to maintaining vaccine effectiveness as the virus evolves.

news.headline: Samsara unveils Enterprise-Grade Asset Tag at Beyond conference, leveraging Samsara Network for location tracking of small assets.
news.summary: At the Beyond conference in Chicago, Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) unveiled the first enterprise-grade Asset Tag aimed at satisfying customer needs for monitoring small, valuable assets. This innovative device utilizes the Samsara Network to enhance tracking capabilities of crucial equipment and tools. By employing this technology, companies can decrease time wasted on locating missing items, lower expenses, and streamline operations.

news.headline: Samsara introduces new solutions at Beyond '24 conference in Chicago, empowering physical operations leaders with data insights. Over 2,000 innovators attending, including Fortune 500 companies like DHL and Sysco.
news.summary: At the Beyond conference in Chicago, Samsara Inc. (NYSE: IOT) unveiled new products tailored for physical operations leaders. With over 2,000 attendees, including top firms like DHL, Sysco, and SLB, the event aims to empower those managing large, labor-intensive operations. The conference, scheduled for June 26-28 in Illinois, showcases innovative solutions for Fortune 500 companies facing complex challenges in their daily operations. Samsara's initiatives are set to revolutionize how businesses handle their assets and workforce.

news.headline: Mitsogo (Hexnode) recognized as strong performer in Gartner Peer Insights™ for UEM, highlighting $4.4 million average data breach cost.
news.summary: A San Francisco-based company, Mitsogo (Hexnode), a division of Mitsogo Inc., has been recognized as a strong performer in the May 2024 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer: Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) sector. According to recent findings, the average cost of a data breach can soar to a substantial 4.4 million USD. To counter this risk, organizations are advised to implement effective security measures to protect critical data and reduce potential financial liabilities.

news.headline: 2024 Cyber & AI Week highlighted tech convergence, emphasizing reshaping potential. Dynamic forum explored innovation future.
news.summary: The recent 2024 Cyber Week & AI Week emphasized the importance of the integration of cyber and AI technologies, showcasing their ability to transform the global landscape. This event gathered a wide range of perspectives and knowledge, establishing a lively platform to discuss the upcoming trends in innovation. Hosted in Tel Aviv, the event attracted a significant number of attendees and experts, indicating the growing interest and investment in the potential of cyber and AI technologies.

news.headline: Avenue Sports Fund invests in CityPickle for growth, spanning indoor courts, bar, restaurant, public spaces; June 27, 2024.
news.summary: CityPickle will be expanding its pickleball club concept by offering indoor courts alongside a full bar and restaurant facilities, as well as setting up activations in iconic public spaces. The Avenue Sports Fund recently revealed a substantial minority investment in CityPickle, a move expected to bring about notable changes in the company. This development signifies a strategic move towards diversification and expansion in the recreational and entertainment sector. The exact amount of the investment was not disclosed, demonstrating the potential growth and opportunity envisioned in this venture.

news.headline: Southwire partners with Envision Racing to combat climate change in Formula E, leading wire company supports electrification.
news.summary: One of the top wire and cable companies in North America, Southwire, has partnered with Envision Racing to take part in the Race Against Climate Change. This collaboration highlights Southwire's significant role in advancing the electrification of the planet. The company, based in CARROLLTON, Ga., is teaming up with a prominent Formula E team to contribute towards driving this transformative initiative.

news.headline: S&P Global Ratings participates in MAS's Project Guardian to boost liquidity and efficiency in financial industry.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, S&P Global Ratings revealed its involvement in the Monetary Authority of Singapore's (MAS) Project Guardian. This project focuses on boosting liquidity and efficiency in the financial sector through collaboration between policymakers and the industry. This initiative aims to enhance market stability and improve financial services.

news.headline: Global Visual Cloud Market to reach $237.2 billion by 2029, up from $126.0 billion in 2024, with CAGR of 13.5%.
news.summary: According to a recent report by MarketsandMarkets™, the Visual Cloud Market is projected to increase from USD 126.0 billion in 2024 to USD 237.2 billion by 2029. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 13.5% over the forecast period. The market's expansion is attributed to factors such as the emergence of new technologies and the increasing demand for advanced visual cloud solutions.

news.headline: Blockchain market projected to grow significantly with USD 7,543.51 Million in 2023 to USD 87,011.20 Million by 2031 at 37.7% CAGR.
news.summary: In Westford, Mass., on June 27, 2024, data from SkyQuest reveals that the worldwide Blockchain Market was valued at USD 6,565.28 Million in 2022. The market is projected to increase from USD 7,543.51 Million in 2023 and is anticipated to surpass USD 87,011.20 Million by 2031. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 37.7% during the forecast period, showcasing significant expansion in the industry.

news.headline: Flume Water chosen to lead largest residential water use study in North America, version 3 of the Water Research Foundation study.
news.summary: A prominent company, Flume Water, has been appointed to carry out the third iteration of the Residential End Uses of Water Study by the Water Research Foundation. This study holds significant influence in the industry. The company is based in San Luis Obispo, California. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Flume Water specializes in offering innovative water monitoring solutions.

news.headline: MIND Technology's virtual meeting for 9% Series A Cumulative Preferred Stock holders adjourned again on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, MIND Technology, Inc. held a virtual special meeting for holders of its 9% Series A Cumulative Preferred Stock. The Company, listed on Nasdaq under tickers MIND and MINDP, reconvened the meeting in The Woodlands, Texas. Key numbers of interest include the 9% rate of the preferred stock and the various stock tickers on the Nasdaq exchange.

news.headline: Bright MLS and SentriLock collaborate to improve showing service technology for real estate marketplace in Mid-Atlantic region.
news.summary: A prominent technology platform in the real estate sector, Bright MLS, operates in the Mid-Atlantic region and partners with SentriLock, a top provider of smart lockbox solutions and secure access technology. The collaboration aims to enhance the real estate marketplace. The partnership was announced on June 27, 2024, in West Chester, Ohio. Bright MLS empowers a fair and efficient real estate environment in the region. SentriLock offers advanced security technology for access, ensuring safety in property transactions. This initiative brings together two key players in the industry to provide cutting-edge solutions for real estate professionals and clients in the Mid-Atlantic area.

news.headline: Esquire Deposition Solutions launches mentorship program in Texas to address critical shortage of Certified Shorthand Reporters.
news.summary: In a bid to address the pressing shortage of Certified Shorthand Reporters (CSRs) in Texas, Esquire Deposition Solutions LLC (Esquire) unveiled a mentorship program on June 27, 2024, aimed at bolstering and expanding the court reporting sector. The state is currently facing a significant deficit of CSRs, prompting this initiative from Esquire to support and develop the industry. The program seeks to bridge the gap by offering guidance and training to aspiring professionals, with the goal of boosting the number of skilled court reporters in Texas.

news.headline: National data reveals natural gas inventory decreased by 52 billion cubic feet, missing the forecast of 54B and lower than the previous 71B.
LSL Pharma Group closes $1.5 million in non-brokered private placement financing. Company is a Canadian pharmaceutical firm.
news.summary: A Canadian pharmaceutical company, LSL Pharma Group Inc., headquartered in Boucherville, Quebec, successfully met the closing requirements of a non-brokered private placement. They have secured $1.5 million in funding, which marks the initial closing of the financing round unveiled on June 5, 2024. This achievement demonstrates the Corporation's ability to garner investor support and move forward with their strategic objectives in the pharmaceutical sector.

news.headline: Pending home sales fell by 2.1% in May. NAR projects 4.26 million existing-home sales with median price hitting $405,300 in 2024.
news.summary: The National Association of Realtors (NAR) is projecting that existing-home sales will reach 4.26 million in 2024, accompanied by a significant rise in the median price to a record annual high of $405,300.

news.headline: Global investor ESG software market to grow by USD 859.6 million from 2024-2028 with 15.7% CAGR, driven by corporate data volumes.
news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the projected expansion of the global investor ESG software market indicates an anticipated increase of approximately USD 859.6 million between 2024 and 2028, states research from Technavio. Forecasts suggest a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.7% during this period. This growth is attributed to a consistent rise in corporate data volumes, signaling positive trends for the market in the coming years.

news.headline: Schneider Electric releases APC Back-UPS™ Pro Gaming UPS in Europe, offering reliable power protection for gamers after 40 years in the industry.
news.summary: Marking four decades of unparalleled reliability and prominence in the industry, the APC Back-UPS™ Pro Gaming UPS guarantees gamers and influencers continued power supply, connectivity, and safeguarding against electrical surges and outages. This UPS, certified by eSports professionals, serves to protect both professional and casual gamers ensuring uninterrupted gameplay.

news.headline: Keynote at MWC Shanghai 2024 highlights secondary 5G innovation by Huawei President, Chen Hao, promoting business growth.
news.summary: In Shanghai on June 27, 2024, Chen Hao, President of Carrier Business at Huawei, spoke at MWC Shanghai 2024. He emphasized the importance of both primary and secondary innovation in driving technology dividends and business success. Key points from his speech included discussing how primary innovation can unlock technological benefits, while secondary innovation speeds up business achievements.

news.headline: Entrepreneur Warwick Sneider launches website promoting regulated financial solutions in South Africa amidst FSCA's efforts to strengthen regulation.
news.summary: In Johannesburg on June 27, 2024, it was highlighted that South Africa's financial sector is constantly evolving, with a strong emphasis on the importance of regulation. The Financial Sector Conduct Authority (FSCA) is actively working to enhance its regulatory framework to safeguard the sector. This effort aims to maintain stability and protect investors.

news.headline: SC rejects liability shield key in Purdue Pharma settlement, protecting Sackler family from civil claims amid opioid epidemic.
news.summary: The Sackler family members would have been safeguarded from civil claims tied to the opioid epidemic under the liability shield.

news.headline: Germany may raise concerns if ECB attempts to decrease French interest rates.
Term life insurance rates are significantly cheaper for 25-year-olds compared to 45-year-olds, as reported by QuickQuote.com.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on June 27, 2024, a report on term life insurance quotes from QuickQuote.com highlighted a significant cost difference. The study showed that a 20-year term life insurance policy for a 25-year-old costs less than half compared to the same policy for a 45-year-old individual. This data emphasizes the importance of obtaining insurance at a younger age. Additionally, considering the longest available term is advisable for maximizing coverage benefits.

news.headline: Building Homes for Heroes and Lowe's will gift over 40 homes to veterans by 2024 and plan to reach more through charity campaign.
news.summary: Building Homes for Heroes, a nonprofit organization, has recently revealed its initiative to donate over 40 homes to veterans in need. This equates to almost one home given away per week for the rest of the year. The organization is achieving this milestone with the help of Lowe's Round Up for Charity campaign. With the partnership, Building Homes for Heroes aims to reach a wider audience and help thousands more veterans in the coming months. This initiative marks a significant contribution to the well-being of these individuals who have served their country.
